economic_notes: Nation has multiple business entities including Stqo:ya Construction LP (51%), Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP (99.99%), Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP (99.99%), and Seabird Island Forestry LP (99.99%). Combined revenue of modified equity entities was $52,524,326 in 2023. Nation earned $5,090,920 from investments in business entities.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Nation consolidates 4 entities (Seabird Education Society, Seabird Island Holdings Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Company Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Limited Partnership) and accounts for 5 business partnerships/enterprises using modified equity method. Large increase in accumulated surplus ($20.5M annual surplus) driven partly by $5.09M earnings from business entities and recognition of previously deferred ISC/FNHA/FNESC funding ($6.17M deferred revenue released). Pension contributions of $530,320 noted. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text. Health and Social Development combined as one segment in financial statements. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + Other federal + Province of BC + FNESC + CMHC + Sto:lo Nation.
